DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-24-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. As to DEFENDANT 21ST CENTURY INSURANCE COMPANY AND BARRY FRANCIS' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT, Defendants' demurrer to the third cause of action in the first amended complaint is sustained without leave to amend. California law does not recognize a claim for negligent infliction of emotional distress based on the facts alleged by Ms. Marenco. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/HK)

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-24-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS 21ST CENTURY INSURANCE COMPANY AND BARRY FRANCIS' MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is off calendar. This motion was resolved by the stipulation and order filed March 16, 2016. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/HK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
